User.title: User Profile
User.description: User profile information for SARS booking system.

Appointment.title: Appointment
Appointment.description: A booking for a SARS service.

userId.description: The UID of the user who booked the appointment.

userEmail.description: The email of the user who booked the appointment.

userName.description: The name of the user who booked the appointment.

serviceId.description: The ID of the service being booked.

branch.description: The SARS branch for the appointment.

date.description: The date and time of the appointment.

status.description: The current status of the appointment.

rejectionReason.description: The reason for rejection if the appointment was rejected.

reminderSent.description: Whether a 24-hour reminder has been sent.

Service.title: SARS Service
Service.description: A type of service offered by SARS.

name.description: The name of the service (e.g., Personal Income Tax).

description.description: A brief description of the service.

id.description: Unique identifier for the log entry.

adminId.description: The UID of the admin who performed the action.

adminEmail.description: The email of the admin who performed the action.

targetId.description: The ID of the target resource (e.g., appointmentId, userId).

details.description: Additional information about the action (e.g., reason, old/new roles).

/audit_logs/{logId}.description: Stores records of administrative actions for auditing purposes.
